'''LMC Hauler One-Six''' was a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] owned by the [[Lant Mining Corporation]]. It was the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of [[Convoy LMC-55c]] when it was captured by a [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]].

[[Pricene]] and [[Erils]] were members of the ship's crew.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-04-XX -->''[[Flashpoint! Brak Sector]]''
